# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Job Deployment Pipeline with GitHub Actions 
on: [push] # Triggers on every push event (i.e., when you make a change in your repository)  
jobs:   
# Job for building artifacts and subsequent jobs downloading them to deploy    
build_and_deploy:     
runs-on: ubuntu-latest 
steps:       # The list of steps that will be run on the job.       
 - name: Checkout code  
   uses: actions/checkout@v2   
         
# Job for building artifacts and subsequent jobs downloading them to deploy    
deploy_job:     
runs-on: ubuntu-latest 
requires: # This step depends on the build job. It means that this will only run after a successful execution of 'build' stage      
steps:       
 - name: Download artifacts  
    uses: actions/download-artifact@v2    
      with:         
         name: my_job1           # The name given to the build job. Replace it here as per requirement 
                                   # This step will download all files from 'my_job' and save them in a folder named "output"  
 - path: ./path/to/save      # Path where you want your downloaded artifacts saved    
   
# Deployment script execution job. Replace it with the actual deployment command or steps required for deploying to production environment 
deploy_script_job :      
runs-on: ubuntu-latest  
steps:       
 - name: Run scripts      # Name of step, replace 'Run Script' as per requirement   
     run: |           # Pipe operator (|) is used here for multiline string. Replace it with actual commands or steps required to deploy the artifacts 
       echo "Deployment script"
